description: Chrome Extension (Manifest V3) — sidebar-first AI-powered GitHub PR explainer. Users provide their own API keys.

backlog.title: Storage module (chrome.storage.sync)
backlog.description: Typed wrapper around chrome.storage.sync. Functions: getApiKeys(), setApiKeys(), clearApiKeys(). Uses sync so keys persist across devices.
acceptance_criteria: getApiKeys() returns typed {anthropicKey?, githubToken?}
setApiKeys() persists to chrome.storage.sync
clearApiKeys() removes stored keys

backlog.title: Popup as settings-only page
backlog.description: Rewrite popup to be settings-only. Two input fields (Anthropic API key required, GitHub token optional). Save/clear buttons. Masked display. Remove options page.
acceptance_criteria: Two password inputs (Anthropic key, GitHub token)
Save persists to chrome.storage.sync
Existing keys pre-populated (masked)
Clear button removes keys
Success/error feedback

backlog.title: Content script — PR detection + toggle button
backlog.description: Content script runs on github.com/*/pull/*. Detects PR pages via turbo:load + MutationObserver + popstate. Injects GitBrief toggle button into PR header using GitHub's own btn classes.
acceptance_criteria: Detects PR pages on initial load and SPA navigation
Injects toggle button into .gh-header-actions
Removes button when navigating away from PR pages
Handles GitHub's Turbo Drive SPA navigation

backlog.title: Sidebar shell — shadow DOM + React mount
backlog.description: Shadow DOM container for sidebar. React app mounted inside shadow root. Tailwind CSS injected via ?inline import. 350px wide fixed panel on right side. State machine: idle/no-keys/loading/streaming/success/error.
acceptance_criteria: Shadow DOM isolates sidebar styles from GitHub
React renders inside shadow root
Tailwind utilities work inside shadow DOM
Sidebar toggles open/closed via button click
350px wide, full viewport height, fixed position

backlog.title: Background worker — message handlers + orchestration
backlog.description: Background service worker handles chrome.runtime.onConnect for streaming analysis and onMessage for one-shots (CHECK_API_KEYS). Orchestrates full pipeline: read keys, parse URL, fetch PR, process diff, call Claude, relay results via port.
acceptance_criteria: onConnect handles 'analyze' port
Sends PROGRESS messages for each pipeline stage
Sends COMPLETE with full AnalysisResponse
Sends ERROR with typed error codes
onMessage handles CHECK_API_KEYS

backlog.title: Sidebar results UI
backlog.description: Sidebar components: AnalyzeButton, LoadingState (progress stages), AnalysisResults (summary, key changes, risks, suggestions), ErrorState (retry + settings link).
acceptance_criteria: AnalyzeButton triggers analysis via port
LoadingState shows progress stages
AnalysisResults renders all sections with severity/impact badges
ErrorState shows retry button and settings link for key errors
Scrollable within sidebar

backlog.title: Claude streaming + progressive relay
backlog.description: Add analyzeWithClaudeStream() using stream:true. Parses SSE events from ReadableStream. Background worker relays STREAM_CHUNK messages to sidebar via port. Sidebar shows streaming progress.
acceptance_criteria: Sends stream:true to Anthropic API
Parses content_block_delta SSE events
Relays text chunks to content script
Parses final accumulated JSON on message_stop
Falls back to non-streaming on error

backlog.title: End-to-end integration + polish
backlog.description: Wire everything together. Test on real PRs. Handle edge cases: large diffs, rate limiting, private repos, network errors. Keyboard shortcut for sidebar toggle.
acceptance_criteria: Full flow works on real GitHub PRs
Large diffs handled gracefully
Private repo without token shows helpful error
Rate limit errors surfaced to user
Sidebar does not break GitHub layout

backlog.title: CI pipeline + Chrome Web Store packaging
backlog.description: GitHub Actions CI (lint, typecheck, test). Build produces ZIP for Chrome Web Store. Update README.
acceptance_criteria: CI runs lint, typecheck, test on PRs
Build produces valid dist/
Package creates gitbrief-extension.zip
